false}, {"resource-id": "com.medicaljoyworks.prognosis:id/historyTab", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "7cd56d4", "children": [{"text": "A 42 year old woman presents with oligomenorrhea for 2 years, and 30 kg of weight gain during the same period, even though her diet remained unchanged.

Her medical history is significant for type 2 diabetes, hypertension and dyslipidemia for 3 years; while well controlled initially, these have worsened over the last year. She is currently on Metformin, Gliclazide, Telmisartan, and Rosuvastatin.

Her family history is significant for polycystic ovarian disease in a sister. She only drinks socially and does not smoke. 

A full blood count is within normal parameters, as are serum electrolytes, and renal and liver profiles. A thyroid profile and serum FSH, LH, testosterone, and growth hormone levels are also normal.", "resource-id": "com.medicaljoyworks.prognosis:id/historyText", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "com.medicaljoyworks.prognosis:id/finishButton", "clickable": true, "class": "com.medicaljoyworks.helper.ui.PrognosisButton", "bounds": [1152, 2018, 1440, 2392], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "A 42 year old woman presents with oligomenorrhea for 2 years, and 30 kg of weight gain during the same period, even though her diet remained unchanged.

Her medical history is significant for type 2 diabetes, hypertension and dyslipidemia for 3 years; while well controlled initially, these have worsened over the last year. She is currently on Metformin, Gliclazide, Telmisartan, and Rosuvastatin.

Her family history is significant for polycystic ovarian disease in a sister. She only drinks socially and does not smoke. 

A full blood count is within normal parameters, as are serum electrolytes, and renal and liver profiles. A thyroid profile and serum FSH, LH, testosterone, and growth hormone levels are also normal.", "resource-id": "com.medicaljoyworks.prognosis:id/historyText", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 259, 1440, 2018], "componentLabel": "Text"}]}
